name: Zero Risk â€” Client Onboarding E2E v2 (Webhook: Deal Won)

nodes.name: Call Onboarding Specialist: Auto-Discovery Dispatch (fire+forget)
nodes.notes:
[MODELB · Costura B · §149 correlation propagation · CC#4 2026-06-05]
workflow_id propagation · prefer sala-dispatched _journey_id (stream_id) · fallback to n8n $workflow.id for legacy Deal Won path. Closes Costura B per SEAM-CLOSE-modelb-shadow-2026-06-05.md. Shadow · worker inactive · NO trigger real.
----


[ADDENDUM 2026-06-05 CC#4] Switched /api/agents/run → /api/agents/run-sdk · §149-enforced canonical entry · STOP-2 Dim 6 clean. workflow_id propagation preserved.

[LAZO PRE-FIRE 2026-06-06 · CC#4]
(1) Task prompt re-wired · instructs agent to CALL emit_discovery_output tool with structured findings (own_handles · competitors[] · icp · landscape_summary). Canon §interface contract matches CC#3 zod schema.
(2) options.timeout bumped 180000 → 800000ms (13.3 min · headroom for 5-6 min agent runs). Previous timeout was culprit of exec 19733 abort "server offline" at 326s.
Shadow · worker active=True · waiting CC#3 agent-runner ship emit_discovery_output tool registration.

[ICP CANON STRICT 2026-06-06 · CC#4 align CC#3 verdict]
Updated icp block in prompt-directive · MCP tool zod is .strict() · old shape (industry/location/segment) was REJECTED · tool call invalid · discovery vacío. New shape · audience_segment (REQUIRED · was "segment") · industries (plural array · was "industry") · geography (was "location") · plus full optional canon fields per PR #182 types.ts DiscoveredIcpSegment.

nodes.name: [APIFY-WIRE] Discovery Parser · dynamic targets (lazo)
nodes.notes:
[LAZO 2026-06-06 · CC#4] Discovery Parser · canon §interface contract.
Lee response de Call Onboarding Specialist · extrae discovery_output JSON.
Emite 1 item por (target × apify_function). Shadow-safe · si contract no
satisfecho · skip marker emitted · APIFY-WIRE downstream se salta gracioso.
Reemplaza el old Load active clients (Supabase REST) · era dry_run-only shadow.

[CANON CONVERGE 2026-06-06 · CC#4 PR #182 align]
Discovery Parser canon · reads response.body.discovery_output (path A canon CC#3) · NO re-parse (CC#3 route.ts handles tool_call + text_parser internally). Falls back to response.body.discovery_persist for HITL branch (parse_kind absent/malformed). ICP canon · DiscoveredIcpSegment | DiscoveredIcpSegment[] · industries[] + geography canon. YouTube competitor handle support added.

nodes.name: [APIFY-WIRE] Split per scrape target (lazo)
nodes.notes:
[LAZO 2026-06-06 · CC#4] n8n itera 1 item por scrape target (Discovery output).
No es por cliente · es por (target × function) tuple emitido por Discovery Parser.

nodes.name: [APIFY-WIRE] Gate · drop skip-markers (lazo)
nodes.notes: [LAZO 2026-06-06 · CC#4] Gate canónico · cuela items skip-marker · mantiene items reales. Old filter-by-cron logic eliminada (canon ya viene del Discovery).

nodes.name: [APIFY-WIRE] Split per function (onboarding_e2e)
nodes.notes:
[LAZO 2026-06-06 · CC#4] DISABLED · Discovery Parser ya emite per-function.
Old per-function split based on static cron · ya no aplica.

nodes.name: [APIFY-WIRE] Call Apify Service Workflow (onboarding_e2e)
nodes.notes:
[LAZO 2026-06-06 · CC#4] Dynamic body · consume Discovery Parser items.
params canonicales del scrape vienen del Discovery agent · NO de static config.
dry_run default false (per item · canon honest). brain persistence ya OK (transform-sections fix #3 ronda anterior).

nodes.name: [MODELB] Dispatch-único Guard · scoped al run
nodes.notes:
Model B adapter · DISPATCH-ÚNICO guard. Verifica que el run venga
dispatchado por la sala (presencia de _sala_correlation_id +
_journey_id en el body del webhook). Si faltan, throw + halt este
run específico (scoped · NO corte global · otros runs siguen igual).
Wiring · entre 'Webhook: Deal Won' y 'Validate Deal Data'.
Activation · §144 + CC#3 receiver listo. CC#4 spec 2026-06-05.

[OLA 2 WIRE+ENABLE 2026-06-05 · CC#4] Wired into main flow + enabled. SALA_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_ENABLED flag sigue OFF (Vercel · CIC Ola 1b pending) · NO dispatch real hasta §144 Emilio + flips Ola 3.

[OLA 2 BUGFIX 2026-06-05 · CC#4] Fixed variable-scope bug in jsCode · return now spreads body directly (no shadow vars · no shorthand bug). Smoke confirmed pre-fix: throw path OK · return path crashed with "_sala_correlation_id is not defined".

nodes.name: [MODELB] Phase-boundary Emit · reconciliación OBSERVE
nodes.notes:
[MODELB · Costura A · RONDA 2 re-point · CC#4 2026-06-05]
Endpoint canónico re-pointed to dedicated /api/sala/ingress (CC#3 final decision).
Previous V2 pointed to multiplexed /api/sala/events/append (now interno-alterno only).
Shadow · disabled · unwired. Activation gate §144 + CC#3 receiver + wiring sesión.
----
[MODELB · Costura A closed · CC#4 2026-06-05]
Endpoint converged to CC#3 canon · /api/sala/events/append (PR #172).
Single endpoint for BOTH event_types · phase_boundary + run_completed.
Phase boundaries canon · 8 names (CC#3 JOURNEY_WORKFLOW_MAP).
Shadow · disabled · unwired. Activation gate §144 + CC#3 receiver verified.
----
Model B adapter · phase-boundary event emitter. POST a la sala
ingress endpoint cuando se cruza una FRONTERA DE FASE (NO los
24+ nodos individuales · solo fases lógicas Journey B ONBOARD).
Phase taxonomy · INTAKE → DISCOVERY → WORKSPACE → SCHEDULING →
NOTIFICATION → CASCADE → APIFY_WIRE → TERMINAL.
Wiring · copy-paste este nodo en cada boundary con phase_name
parametrizado. Activation · §144 + CC#3 receiver. CC#4 2026-06-05.

[OLA 2 WIRE+ENABLE 2026-06-05 · CC#4] Wired into main flow + enabled. SALA_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_ENABLED flag sigue OFF (Vercel · CIC Ola 1b pending) · NO dispatch real hasta §144 Emilio + flips Ola 3.

[R1 CANON RENAME 2026-06-28 · CC#2] phase_name → MAYÚSCULA canónica. Display name legacy preservado (no referenciado · evita cirugía connection-keys). Order-tolerant reconciliation PR #217 cubre orden DAG paralelo.

={{ JSON.stringify({

    source: "onboarding_e2e_5phase",

}) }}

nodes.name: [APIFY-WIRE] POST /api/hitl/queue (canon)
nodes.notes: [CANON CONVERGE 2026-06-06 · CC#4 PR #182] HITL inbox enqueue · canon path C. POST /api/hitl/queue with type=discovery_persist_failure · best-effort · neverError. Worker continues normal flow after enqueue (skipping scraping for this run).

nodes.name: Build Master Journey Input (canon shape)
nodes.notes: CC#4 2026-06-09 rewire P0 · Fix journey_type=undefined at Master Journey ugK3. Shapes payload as { body: { journey: ONBOARD, client_id, trigger_type, params } } per parse-validate-request expectations of ugK3QrxkWq22Bly5 webhook entry.

nodes.name: Call Onboarding Specialist: Auto-Discovery
nodes.notes: CC#4 2026-06-09 · NAME-PRESERVED unwrap of Vercel callback envelope (PR #185). Inherits the original name "Call Onboarding Specialist: Auto-Discovery" so that downstream references like $('Call Onboarding Specialist: Auto-Discovery').item.json.response resolve to the unwrapped agent result without code edits in consumer nodes.

nodes.name: Wait · Camino III decision
nodes.notes: CC#4 2026-06-09 · Camino III decision wait · pareja con POST /api/hitl/queue. Camino III revisa→vota→decide; POSTea callback_url con {decision: "PASS" | "REJECT"}. Wait reanuda + IF downstream evalúa decision. Limit 86400s (24h) · expira clean si Camino III no responde.

nodes.name: Onboarding rejected · Camino III
nodes.notes: CC#4 2026-06-09 · terminal · onboarding rejected by Camino III · flow stops cleanly · no cascade · no scrape fire.
